description.value:
Requirements Your mouth is full of water.

You can spray a powerful steam of water from your mouth to push your foes around. Filling your mouth with water for your stream requires using an Interact action while next to a source of at least 1 gallon of water. You can hold water in your mouth indefinitely, but while you do, you're unable to speak. When you use Frog Geyser, you shoot water in a @Template[type:line|distance:20]. All creatures in the line must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is pushed back 5 feet.

Failure The creature is pushed back 10 feet.

Critical Failure The creature is pushed back 10 feet and knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone].
